title: Fever in Children
description: Parent guide to fever in children, including home care, warning signs, and when to seek medical help.
keywords: fever, child fever, temperature, axillary thermometer, red flags, dehydration, febrile seizure, parent guide
references: IAP Guidelines for Fever; IAP STG 146 Management of Fever without Focus in Office Practice; ICMR STW Fever in Children; RCH Australia Fever in children; NICE NG143 Fever in under 5s; American Academy of Pediatrics fever and thermometer guidance
